key_rules.properties: display:inline-block;font-weight:400;text-align:center;white-space:normal;vertical-align:middle;-webkit-user-select:none;-moz-user-select:none;-ms-user-select:none;user-select:none;border:1px solid transparent;padding-top:10px;padding-bottom:10px;padding-left:25px;padding-right:25px;line-height:1.5;border-radius:.25rem;transition:color .15s ease-in-out,background-color .15s ease-in-out,border-color .15s ease-in-out,box-shadow .15s ease-in-out;margin:20px auto;font-size:20px;font-family:Helvetica, serif;
